<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/comparator. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\Comparator; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for sebastian/comparator */ final class RuntimeException extends \RuntimeException implements Exception { }
